work_experience___job_1.address: 845 Market Street, Suite 1900, San Francisco, CA 94103
work_experience___job_1.reason_for_leaving: Seeking a role with broader strategic responsibility and relocation to be closer to family on the East Coast.
work_experience___job_1.describe_your_duties_line_1: Led performance marketing reporting and analysis across paid search, paid social, and email campaigns, including weekly dashboards, ROI tracking, and A/B test design and evaluation for a portfolio of mid-market B2B clients.
work_experience___job_1.describe_your_duties_line_2: Collaborated closely with account managers and creative teams to translate data insights into concrete campaign optimizations, built automated reporting in Excel and Tableau, trained two junior analysts, and regularly presented findings and recommendations to client stakeholders and senior leadership.

work_experience___job_2.current_salary_2: $61,000 per year at time of departure
work_experience___job_2.reason_for_leaving_2: Accepted a more analytics-focused role with greater opportunities for advancement and exposure to digital performance marketing in a different city.
work_experience___job_2.describe_your_duties_line_1_2: Coordinated execution of in-store and digital marketing campaigns for a regional chain of home goods stores, including email newsletters, social media calendars, seasonal promotions, and basic performance tracking.
work_experience___job_2.describe_your_duties_line_2_2: Worked with external designers and printers on marketing collateral, maintained product and promotional content on the company website, supported event planning for store openings and local sponsorships, and compiled monthly reports on campaign results for the marketing manager.

work_experience___job_3.current_salary_3: $19.80 per hour at time of departure
work_experience___job_3.reason_for_leaving_3: Wanted to transition from frontline financial services into a marketing-focused role more aligned with degree and long-term career goals.
work_experience___job_3.describe_your_duties_line_1_3: Provided day-to-day service to credit union members, including opening and closing accounts, processing deposits and withdrawals, assisting with online banking issues, and answering questions about products and services in person and over the phone.
work_experience___job_3.describe_your_duties_line_2_3: Maintained accurate transaction records, followed compliance and security procedures, identified opportunities to cross-sell appropriate financial products, and assisted with basic community outreach events such as financial literacy workshops and local fairs.
